© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Key Takeaways:
• Evergreen product launches are working very well. Once you’ve gone through
Product Launch Formula and done your launch, consider making it Evergreen.
• It’s not the right solution for every business or product, but I’ve given you a lot of
different models to work from.
• This is an exciting time because we’re just getting started. Going forward it’s going
to become much easier to implement this with all the tools that we’ll have.
• However, it’s not about the tools, it’s about the sequence and getting that down
right.
• For example, I’m about to go back and make some tweaks in my Evergreen
sequence, and I’ll be able to test it. It’s about constantly making it better.
• Remember, you don’t have to make everything Evergreen. Some products just
won’t be right for it.
• Also, you can keep some products on the market, and keep others off.
• And you don’t have to be perfect, you can just make it work for now. This makes
buying traffic a viable solution, rather than running a launch and attracting JV’s.
• We’re still in the infancy of this and it will only get better, so give it a shot!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
There you have it, evergreen product launches. These things are really cool and
they are working – they work very well.
Basically once you’ve done your launch, once you’ve gone through Product
Launch Formula, then consider making it evergreen. Like I said, it’s not the right answer
for every situation, for every business, for every launch sequence, for every product, but
for a lot of them it is.
I’ve given you a few different models to work on. Now, this is an exciting time.
There are new tools coming out all the time and this keeps on getting easier and easier.
I’ll tell you what, a year from now I can guarantee this is going to be so much easier to
actually implement the doing of it.
Remember, as with everything, the reality is that the tools and even to a lesser
extent the techniques themselves aren’t nearly as important as getting that sequence and
getting it right.
The beautiful thing about evergreen is you can test your sequence, you can test
everything about it, but you can just nail it and get it right. For instance, I’m ready to put
together an Evergreen Launch free product. I really like the sequence I’ve got put
together, the first video is great, but there’s a couple little tweaks I want to go back and
do. Now I’ve got time to go back and make those couple little tweaks and tighten it up.
Then I’ll be able to test it, I’ll be able to test the new video versus the old video. So, that’s
the beautiful thing.
Remember, you don’t have to make everything evergreen. Some products just
aren’t going to be great. Remember, it’s a nice mix to have some stuff evergreen, some
stuff always on the market, especially more inexpensive lower end stuff always on the
market because you can use that to generate leads or to generate front end sales and then
drive people into evergreen.
So, it’s a really exciting time. We’re just starting to develop this stuff all now and a
year from now it’s going to be that much better. But, as it is it’s working right now. And
you don’t have to be perfect, you can just cobble it together and throw it together. This is
a way you can build a serious business.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

The really cool thing is this makes buying traffic as opposed to building a list and
then running a launch or getting JVs and then doing a launch, this makes buying traffic
and running traffic in, lots of different ways to buy traffic, or sending social media traffic
in, or SEO traffic that you can get on an ongoing basis, all that traffic becomes very viable
now because you can start to monetize it right away.
That’s it for Evergreen Launches. It was fun sharing this stuff with you and I can’t
wait to hear back from you and see where you take this, because this is the infancy for
Evergreen Launches. Like I said, a year from now we’re going to be way further along.
So, give it a shot, test it out, let me know how it goes.
Leave me a comment or send an email into support and tell me how you’re using
evergreen, how you’re doing it. I might even want to do a case study with you, because
like I said, we’re just the tip of the iceberg, the absolute infancy with these Evergreen
Launches. So, go get ‘em.
